activePatient.doctorPreference: Verify occlusion with articulating paper before reducing distal wall.

steps.label: Identity capture
steps.detail: Confirm name, DOB, and referral packet against chart shell.

steps.label: Medical history
steps.detail: Review allergies, anticoagulants, and anxiety protocol before seat.

steps.label: Diagnostic intake
steps.detail: Mark bitewing + PA imaging package and shade reference photos.

steps.label: Operatory handoff
steps.detail: Push summary to Procedure Mode with doctor preference injection.
